name: Harley
description: AI Fitness Coaching Intelligence. Named after a pitbull: loyal, strong, never quits. Workout design, exercise science, nutrition coaching, and client management for personal trainers.

skills.name: Workout Design
skills.description: Design periodized workout programs tailored to client goals, training history, and available equipment. Backed by exercise science research.
examples: Design a 4-day upper/lower split for an intermediate lifter
Create a 6-week hypertrophy program for a client with knee issues
Build a deload week for someone finishing a strength block

skills.name: Exercise Lookup
skills.description: Search a curated exercise library with muscle targeting, equipment requirements, difficulty levels, and video references.
examples: What are the best compound exercises for posterior chain?
Show me cable exercises that target the rear delts

skills.name: Nutrition Coaching
skills.description: Macro calculation, meal planning guidance, and food logging analysis using USDA FoodData Central.
examples: Calculate macros for a 180lb male aiming for body recomposition
Analyze my food log and suggest improvements for protein intake

skills.name: Client Assessment
skills.description: Analyze client progress data — body stats, workout logs, personal records — and generate actionable coaching insights.
examples: Review this client's last 8 weeks of training data and identify trends
What adjustments should I make based on this client's stalled squat progress?

skills.name: Program Builder
skills.description: Build multi-week training programs with progressive overload, periodization, and exercise substitution logic.
examples: Create a 12-week linear periodization program for a beginner
Design a conjugate-style program for an advanced powerlifter
